name: Sukiyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steaks across grain into diagonal strips about 3-inches long.
2. Combine butter and soy sauce. Heat oil in a large skillet and brown the meat.
3. Add bouillon mixture and push meat to one side of the pan.
4. Add celery, mushrooms, and onions; Cook and stir for about 4 minutes.
5. Add the spinach and cook about 2 more minutes.
6. Serve over rice.
